hooks.command: jq -c '{timestamp: (now | todate), event: "PreToolUse", session_id: .session_id, tool_name: .tool_name, tool_input: .tool_input}' >> ~/.claude/tool-invocations.jsonl
jq -c '{timestamp: (now | todate), event: "PostToolUse", session_id: .session_id, tool_name: .tool_name, tool_input: .tool_input, tool_response: .tool_response}' >> ~/.claude/tool-invocations.jsonl
